3 7 5 2 8 6 4 3 7 4 7 6 8 2 6 5 8 9 7 9 6 1 2 7 3
How many such odd digits are there, each of which is immediately preceded by a perfect square and immediately followed by an odd digit? (NOTE: 1 is also a perfect square)

A ray of light is incident on a reflecting surface AB of a glass prism, kept in air, and emerges out of the other reflecting surface AC. Consider the following statements:
(a) The angle of refraction at surface AB is less than the angle of incidence.
(b) The angle of refraction at the surface AC is more than the angle of incidence.
Which of the above statement(s) is/are correct?
Select the correct match in the context of microfinance.

(i) Point of refraction
(ii) Optical Centre
(iii) Point of incidence

A statement is given followed by two assumptions numbered I and II. You have to assume everything in the statement to be true and decide which of the assumptions is/are implicit in the statement.
Statement:
Increase in the bus rates will hurt the pockets of the salaried middle class.
Assumptions:
I. Increase in the prices of goods will hurt the poor too.
II. The middle class will reduce their extra expenditure to save money.
options: Neither assumption I nor II is implicit
Both assumptions I and II are implicit

options: a point between F and C
a point between P and F

A certain number of people are sitting in a row, facing north. D sits fourth to the right of A. B sits third to the right of D. C sits fifth to the left of A. There are only two persons between B and E. H sits one place to the right of A. If no other person is sitting in the row, what is the total number of persons seated?
If the length of a rectangle is thrice its breadth and the perimeter of the rectangle is 48 cm, then find its breadth.

Seven people, A, B, C, D, E, F and G, are sitting in a straight row, facing north. Only four people sit between F and E. Only two people sit to the left of F. D is not an immediate neighbour of E. D sits second to the right of A. G sits to the right of D. Who sits at the extreme left end of the row?
